note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Zoë confronts Mateo about the cryptic message from Dr. Baeza. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Zoë discovers a hidden folder with cryptic files from Dr. Baeza. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo reveals a disturbing connection between lottery winners and a mysterious biotech firm. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo's cryptic message sparks Zoë's growing unease about their investigation. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Zoë discovers a disturbing connection between lottery winners and an obscure neuroscience paper. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Zoë discovers Mateo's cryptic lottery ticket stash and a disturbing surveillance system. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Zoë's escalating paranoia forces her to re-examine the lottery's true purpose and potential consequences. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Zoë discovers Mateo's secret lottery winnings research, fuelling her growing suspicion. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Zoë's unease grows as she realizes Mateo's plan relies on an untested, high-stakes algorithm. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Mateo's hacking progress sparks unease in Zoë Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Zoë and Mateo frantically analyze the lottery winner's encrypted data. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Zoë confronts Mateo about the lottery's true purpose and his involvement. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Zoë's growing suspicion of Mateo forces her to secretly investigate his past. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo's lottery algorithm yields a disturbing probability of catastrophic failure. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Zoë's last resort to prevent catastrophe is met with an unsettling, calculated silence from Mateo. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("All-In") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
